quote: Time is what we want most, but what we use worst.
author: William Penn

quote: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: Lost time is never found again.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Time you enjoy wasting is not wasted time.
author: Marthe Troly-Curtin

quote: The bad news is time flies. The good news is you're the pilot.
author: Michael Altshuler

quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

quote: Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Time is the most valuable thing a man can spend.
author: Theophrastus

quote: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Time flies over us, but leaves its shadow behind.
author: Nathaniel Hawthorne

quote: Better three hours too soon than a minute too late.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: Time is a created thing. To say 'I don't have time' is to say 'I don't want to'.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

quote: If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal, not to people or things.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
author: Socrates

quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Do not save what is left after spending, but spend what is left after saving.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Time management is life management.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
author: Lewis Carroll

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of a commitment to excellence.

quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

quote: You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Peace begins with a smile.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are in harmony.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: The price of anything is the amount of life you exchange for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: It's not about having time. It's about making time.
author: Unknown

quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

quote: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you'll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
author: Epictetus

quote: It's not how much money you make, but how much money you keep.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

quote: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
author: T.S. Eliot

quote: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you react to it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

quote: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Happiness is not by chance, but by choice.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quote: Peace is the result of retraining your mind to process life as it is, rather than as you think it should be.
author: Wayne Dyer

quote: Until you value yourself, you won't value your time.

quote: Procrastination is the thief of time.

quote: One day or day one. You decide.
author: Unknown

quote: Dream big, start small, act now.

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: Money is a terrible master but an excellent servant.

quote: Never spend your money before you have earned it.
author: Thomas Jefferson

quote: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing.

quote: Time is the coin of your life. You spend it. Do not allow others to spend it for you.
author: Carl Sandburg

quote: The common man is not concerned about the passage of time, the man of talent is driven by it.

quote: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
author: Confucius

quote: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.

quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.

quote: For every minute you are angry you lose sixty seconds of happiness.

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: Aristotle

quote: The greatest wealth is to live content with little.

quote: Do not let the behavior of others destroy your inner peace.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Nothing can bring you peace but yourself.

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.

quote: Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.

quote: You may delay, but time will not.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Time spent on planning is never time wasted.

quote: Formal education will make you a living; self-education will make you a fortune.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: The habit of saving is itself an education; it fosters every virtue.

quote: Financial peace isn't the acquisition of stuff. It's learning to live on less than you make.

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.

quote: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.

quote: Happiness is not a goal; it is a by-product.

quote: Peace is not absence of conflict, it is the ability to handle conflict by peaceful means.

quote: If you want to make peace with your enemy, you have to work with your enemy.

quote: Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.

quote: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
author: Thomas Jefferson

quote: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.

quote: Time flies, but memories last forever.

quote: Make each day your masterpiece.
author: John Wooden

quote: Time is free, but it's priceless. You can't own it, but you can use it.

quote: Taking care of yourself is the most powerful way to begin to take care of others.

quote: Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: The richest man is not he who has the most, but he who needs the least.
author: Unknown

quote: Beware of little expenses; a small leak will sink a great ship.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: The real measure of your wealth is how much you'd be worth if you lost all your money.
author: Unknown

quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.

quote: Life is too important to be taken seriously.

quote: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, honorable, compassionate.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Happiness is a direction, not a place.

quote: The most wasted of days is one without laughter.

quote: Be happy for this moment. This moment is your life.

quote: Peace is always beautiful.
author: Walt Whitman

quote: When the power of love overcomes the love of power, the world will know peace.

quote: Inner peace begins the moment you choose not to allow another person to control your emotions.

quote: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become.

quote: Don't wait for opportunity. Create it.
author: Unknown

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Effective performance is preceded by painstaking preparation.

quote: Give me six hours to chop down a tree and I will spend the first four sharpening the axe.

quote: Time management is about life management, about managing relationships and your health.
author: Unknown

quote: A budget is telling your money where to go instead of wondering where it went.

quote: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.

quote: Every time you borrow money, you're robbing your future self.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: The purpose of life is to live it, to taste experience to the utmost.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
author: Anais Nin

quote: Happiness is not something you postpone for the future; it is something you design for the present.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: The secret of happiness is freedom, the secret of freedom is courage.
author: Carrie Jones

quote: Happiness is letting go of what you think your life is supposed to look like.
author: Unknown

quote: Nobody can bring you peace but yourself.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Peace is not something you wish for; it's something you make.
author: John Lennon

quote: If you're not willing to risk, you cannot grow.
author: Unknown

quote: The road to success and greatness is always paved with consistent hard work.
author: Dwayne Johnson

quote: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.

quote: Things which matter most must never be at the mercy of things which matter least.

quote: Time is the scarcest resource and unless it is managed nothing else can be managed.

quote: The shorter way to do many things is to only do one thing at a time.

quote: Investing should be more like watching paint dry or watching grass grow.

quote: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The best investment you can make is in yourself.

quote: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
author: Helen Keller

quote: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Life is made of ever so many partings welded together.
author: Charles Dickens

quote: If you want happiness for an hour, take a nap. If you want happiness for a lifetime, help someone.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: Happiness is not in the mere possession of money; it lies in the joy of achievement.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: True happiness is to enjoy the present, without anxious dependence upon the future.
author: Lucius Annaeus Seneca

quote: If you want peace, you don't talk to your friends. You talk to your enemies.

quote: The simplification of life is one of the steps to inner peace.

quote: Without ambition one starts nothing. Without work one finishes nothing.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Intelligence without ambition is a bird without wings.

quote: The only thing standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself.
author: Jordan Belfort

quote: Time blocking is a time management method that asks you to divide your day into blocks of time.
author: Cal Newport

quote: Lack of direction, not lack of time, is the problem. We all have twenty-four hour days.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Time in the market beats timing the market.
author: Ken Fisher

quote: And We have certainly created man in the best of stature.
author: Quran 95:4

quote: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
author: Quran 94:6

quote: So verily, with every difficulty, there is relief.
author: Quran 94:5

quote: And He is with you wherever you are.
author: Quran 57:4

quote: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.
author: Quran 2:286

quote: The best among you are those who have the best manners and character.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: Speak good or remain silent.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: The strong person is not the one who can wrestle someone else down. The strong person is the one who can control himself when he is angry.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: And whoever fears Allah, He will make for him a way out.
author: Quran 65:2

quote: Be kind, for whenever kindness becomes part of something, it beautifies it.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: Do not lose hope, nor be sad.
author: Quran 3:139

quote: Indeed, Allah is with those who are patient.
author: Quran 2:153

quote: The believer who has the most perfect faith is the one whose character is finest and who is kindest to his wife.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: When you see a person who has been given more than you in money and beauty, look to those who have been given less.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: The worldly life is nothing but play and amusement, but far better is the Home in the Hereafter.
author: Quran 6:32

quote: And seek help through patience and prayer.
author: Quran 2:45

quote: Richness is not having many possessions, but richness is being content with oneself.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: The best of people are those that bring most benefit to the rest of mankind.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: Life is a bridge. Cross over it, but build no house upon it.
author: Islamic Wisdom

quote: The smallest good deed is better than the grandest intention.
author: Islamic Wisdom

quote: Life is like a shadow. It will never be still for a moment.
author: Unknown

quote: Every moment is a gift. That's why it's called the present.
author: Unknown

quote: Life is not measured by the number of breaths we take, but by the moments that take our breath away.
author: Unknown

quote: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take and the decisions we waited too long to make.
author: Unknown

quote: Life is a journey, and if you fall in love with the journey, you will be in love forever.
author: Peter Hagerty

quote: The meaning of life is to find your gift. The purpose of life is to give it away.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Life is a one-time offer, use it well.
author: Unknown

quote: Don't count the days, make the days count.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: Life is short, and it's up to you to make it sweet.
author: Sarah Louise Delany

quote: The purpose of life is a life of purpose.
author: Robert Byrne

quote: Life isn't about waiting for the storm to pass, it's about learning to dance in the rain.
author: Vivian Greene

quote: Your time is precious. Don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Unknown

quote: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never failing, but in rising every time we fail.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Life begins at the end of your comfort zone.
author: Neale Donald Walsch

quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
author: Buddha

quote: The best preparation for tomorrow is doing your best today.
author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

quote: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

quote: May your choices reflect your hopes, not your fears.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Remember that time is money.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: The early bird catches the worm.
author: Proverb

quote: Life is too precious to waste on negativity.
author: Unknown

quote: Each morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
author: Buddha
